scope: P2-3 bureau communication attachment hashes bind to decoded bytes, not base64 text.
certifyingReason: The byte-hashing tests and repo-supported validation passed, but the exact requested Vitest command with --runInBand fails before test execution because Vitest 4.1.5 does not support that option.

preservedSubsystems: existing response classification and obligation update flow

digestStoredIn: bureau communication storage object name hash prefix

automatedEvidence.requirement: same binary with different base64 line wrapping produces same hash
data URL and raw base64 for same bytes produce same hash
existing bureau communication behavior still works

automatedEvidence.test: pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts tests/unit tests/api

commands.command: pnpm exec vitest run tests/unit tests/api --runInBand
pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts tests/unit tests/api

commands.summary: Build, golden path, unit suite, deterministic ingestion report, credit parser regression, tradeline internal checks, and violation correction regression passed.
